title: Ubiquiti UACC-UCG-Industrial-RM, Rack mount for UCG-Industrial
category: Ubiquiti UACC-UCG-Industrial-RM, Rack mount for UCG-Industrial
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-UCG-Industrial-RM is designed to mount (1) UniFi Cloud Gateway Industrial (UCG-Industrial) into a 19" rack . The longer mount includes a practical holder for the power adapter
